# UC-13.2.42 · Fluent Bit Multiline Parser Buffer Limit Overruns

## Description

Truncated stack traces break APM correlation and security investigations.

## Value

Ensures multiline buffers sized for longest stack frames.

## Implementation

Increase `Buffer_Max_Size` / `flush_ms` per vendor guidance; test with synthetic long lines.

## SPL

```spl
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentbit:log"
| search "multiline" AND ("buffer" OR "limit" OR "truncat" OR "incomplete")
| stats count by host, multiline_parser
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Histogram (line length proxy), Table (parser × host).

## References

- [Fluent Bit monitoring — storage](https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/administration/monitoring)
- [Fluentd monitoring](https://docs.fluentd.org/deployment/monitoring)
